name: impeccable
author: Paul Bakaus
description: Design skills, commands, and anti-pattern detection for AI coding agents

scripts.build: bun run build:skills && bun run build:site && cp -R dist build/_data/dist
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun run build
scripts.preview: bun run build && npx astro preview
scripts.deploy: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy build/
scripts.test: bun test tests/build.test.js tests/detect-antipatterns.test.js tests/windows-path-fix.test.js && node --test tests/detect-antipatterns-fixtures.test.mjs && node --test tests/detect-antipatterns-browser.test.mjs && node --test tests/cleanup-deprecated.test.mjs && node --test tests/impeccable-paths.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-wrap.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-reference.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-accept.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-inject.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-poll.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-server.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-browser-regression.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-session-store.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-browser-session.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-browser-source.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-completion.test.mjs && node --test tests/live-recovery-commands.test.mjs && node --test tests/framework-fixtures.test.mjs
scripts.prepack: cp README.md README.repo.md && cp README.npm.md README.md
